page_metadata.bioconda__summary: antiSMASH - the antibiotics and Secondary Metabolite Analysis SHell.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Rapid genome-wide identification, annotation and analysis of secondary metabolite biosynthesis gene clusters in bacterial and fungal genomes. it integrates and cross-links with a large number of in silico secondary metabolite analysis tools that have been published earlier.

It integrates and cross-links with a large number of in silico secondary metabolite analysis tools that have been published earlier.

page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Antismash allows the genome-wide identification, annotation and analysis of secondary metabolite biosynthesis gene clusters
